intent: Add a run.sh to kcd2_dice_solver that installs dependencies and starts the dice solver's dev server with a single command.
scope: No changes to app source, tests, or build config
changes: run.sh ensures Node >=22 (installing the LTS via nvm if missing/too old) and pnpm (via corepack) if missing
run.sh runs `pnpm install` then `exec pnpm dev` from the script's own directory

verification.evidence: No warnings after fixing one SC2155 (declare/assign separately)
Installed deps, then 'VITE v6.4.3 ready in 132 ms' / Local: http://localhost:5174/
All applicable hooks Passed (shellcheck, executables-have-shebangs, ai-evidence-contract, etc.)

risks: If nvm is not installed on a machine, run.sh exits with an explicit error instead of installing nvm itself (out of scope)
rollback: No other files depend on it
